pros: Checkout API plus Open Banking sandbox
review.verdict: Solid for Swiss-native merchants needing bank-grade rails, but DX and pace trail modern PSPs.
review.best_for: Swiss merchants and fintechs needing a bank-backed checkout and Open Banking rails
review.not_for: Teams outside Switzerland or expecting fast iteration and English-first docs
